song.title: If You Want Me To
song.author: Ginny Owens
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C2 G D Em The pathway is broken and the signs are unclear . C2 G D Em And I don’t know the reason why You brought me here . C2 G D Em But just because You love me| the way that You do .C2 A7 I’m gonna walk through the valley .Am (D) G C G If You want me to [V2] . C2 G D Em Cause I’m not who I was when I took my first step . C2 G D Em And I’m clinging to the promise You’re not through with me yet . C2 G D Em So if all of these trials bring me closer to You .C2 A7 Then I will go through the fire .Am (D) G C G Am G If You want me to [V3] .C D C D It may not be the way |I would have chosen .Em C D When You lead me through a world that’s not my home .C D F C But You never said it would be easy .Am Dsus D C2 G D Em You only said I’d never go alone [V4] .C2 G D Em So when the whole world turns against me .C2 G D Em And I’m all by myself .C2 G D Em And I can’t hear You answer |my cries for help .C2 A7 I’ll remember the suffering Your love put You through .Am (D) G And I will go through the valley
If You want me to
